_README: Copy this file to .llm-routing.json and edit. Enable routing with LLM_ROUTING_ENABLED=true. Env vars LLM_TIER_<TIER>_PROVIDER / API_KEY / MODEL / BASE_URL and LLM_PURPOSE__<SLUG>_PROVIDER etc. override file values.

utility.image_review._comment_local: Route VLM image-review to a local LM Studio instance running Qwen3-VL. Used by reviewImage() during generation AND by the fidelity audit tools (`pnpm calibrate-vlm`, `pnpm audit-fidelity`). Set LLM_ROUTING_ENABLED=true. Backup model ids loaded in LM Studio: minicpm-v-4_5, huihui-minicpm-v-4_5-abliterated.
